title: Same shape, different decade
subtitle: Five SDLC patterns from Valispace (2019–2023) and their agentic equivalents in 2026.

left.label: VALISPACE · 2019–2023
left.title: DevOps for humans
items: ValiAdmin — one control plane, queryable by anyone
Valinstall — customer success ships without engineers
Two-week release cycle, 400 deploys in 4 hours
Tooling teaches the rules: "if you do it twice, automate it"

right.label: AGENTIC ENGINEERING · 2026
right.title: DevOps for humans + agents
items: Skills, MCPs — the team ships without engineers
Hosted model APIs (Anthropic, Bedrock) by default
Tooling teaches the rules: "if you do it twice, write a skill"
